title: millotia pilosa
intro: Millotia pilosa is a perennial herb native to Australia, belonging to the family Asteraceae and commonly known as the woolly daisy bush. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Millotia pilosa include its ability to relieve symptoms of colds, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. In terms of herbal preparations, Millotia pilosa can be used to make teas, infusions, and salves, with the leaves and flowers being the most commonly used parts of the plant.
